case_title: EUNG BONG LEE VS. PETER DODSON et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-23-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-13-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE DEC-05-2013.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, EUNG BONG SERVED JUL-18-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DODSON, PETER
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DODSON, PETER

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE SEP-24-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR EDWARD CHARLES CASEY.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, EUNG BONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DODSON, PETER $3,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,250.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, EUNG BONG AS TO DEFENDANT DODSON, PETER
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR SPOTSWOOD, RICHARD DAVID

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-13-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR APR-23-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
